title: Report on the proposed subsidy to TBG Open Door Homes Ltd by the London Borough of Barnet
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to LBB concerning its proposed subsidy to Open Door Homes.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of LBB’s Assessment of Compliance of its proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information, visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to TBG Open Door Homes Ltd by the London Borough of Barnet "
